name: Shop: Loyalty NFC Setup

description.en: Program NFC cards for a shop's loyalty program. All cards get the same agent URL — the NFC chip's hardware ID is the unique card identity.
description.de: Programmiere NFC-Karten für das Treueprogramm eines Shops. Alle Karten bekommen dieselbe Agent-URL — die Hardware-ID des NFC-Chips ist die eindeutige Kartenidentität.

bot: This warp programs NFC cards for a merchant. All cards get the same URL. The NFC chip's built-in hardware ID serves as the unique card identifier.

success.en: Card programmed! Each card's NFC hardware ID is its unique identity.
success.de: Karte programmiert! Die NFC-Hardware-ID jeder Karte ist ihre eindeutige Identität.
